mapper.select: SELECT e.event_seq ,e.title ,e.description AS content ,e.description AS summary ,e.start_at AS event_start_dt ,e.end_at AS event_end_dt ,e.registration_start_at AS registration_start_dt ,e.registration_end_at AS registration_end_dt ,e.venue_name AS location ,e.venue_address ,e.registration_type ,e.registration_url ,e.status ,CASE WHEN e.deleted_at IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS use_yn ,e.file_seq ,e.attachment_file_seq ,e.event_type ,e.organization_seq ,o.name AS organization_name ,e.max_participants ,e.is_paid ,e.created_by AS rgst_user_seq ,e.created_at AS rgst_date_time ,e.updated_by AS upt_user_seq ,e.updated_at AS upt_date_time FROM event.events e LEFT JOIN event.organizations o ON o.organization_seq = e.organization_seq WHERE e.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event.events ( slug, title, description, event_type, is_paid, start_at, end_at, registration_start_at, registration_end_at, venue_name, venue_address, max_participants, organization_seq, file_seq, attachment_file_seq, registration_type, registration_url, status, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( 'event-' || substr(md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text), 1, 12), #{title}, #{content}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{eventType}, ''), 'main'), COALESCE(#{isPaid}, false), #{eventStartDt}, #{eventEndDt}, #{registrationStartDt}, #{registrationEndDt}, #{location}, #{venueAddress}, #{maxParticipants}, #{organizationSeq}, #{fileSeq}, #{attachmentFileSeq}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{registrationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ''), 'direct'), #{registrationUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{status}, ''), 'draft'), #{rgstUserSeq}, #{uptUserSeq} )
mapper.delete: UPDATE event.events SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE event_seq = #{eventSeq}
